code reason:
07=Resident refused

907 WLCHR_150_INTRM_CD WLCHR_150_INTRM_CD GG0170SS5 Type of wheelchair or scooter (Interim Perf) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the resident's type of wheelchair used to wheel 150 feet during this assessment period plus the two previous calendar days.
